privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated drone mission instructions. I confirmed that the expected QGC plan path is '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/solar_patrol.plan' and the brief path is '/home/ga/Documents/QGC/inspection_brief.txt'. The configuration parameters exactly match the prompt and setup_task.sh, requiring an MNT1_TYPE of 2.0, waypoint altitude of 30.0 m, inspection pitch of -60.0 degrees, transit pitch of 0.0 degrees, and a loiter time of 15.0 seconds. The verification logic in verifier.py strictly enforces all pitch and loiter duration checks.
